description: AWS China is the China-region deployment of Amazon Web Services, offering cloud infrastructure and platform services in the Beijing and Ningxia regions. It uses separate China-specific accounts, credentials, and service endpoints from other AWS regions.
summary: AWS China exposes region- and service-specific HTTPS APIs under `*.amazonaws.com.cn` plus the AWS CLI; API requests use AWS SigV4/SigV4a with AWS China credentials, and the CLI can use either access keys or IAM Identity Center login.
